heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 300t–14 Authorization of appropriations
text: To make payments under grants under sections 300t–12 and 300t–13 of this title there are authorized to be appropriated $30,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $50,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , and $75,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , except that in any fiscal year not more than 10 percent of the amount appropriated under this section may be obligated for grants under .September 30, 1980September 30, 1981September 30, 1982section 300t–13 of this title
